original: This implant causes a synthetic lining to grow in and around the users womb (or wombs)! The artificial additions allow for greatly decreased incubation times with no negative consequences to the unborn. Pregnancies tend to result in permanent thickness and hipsize increases as the womb adjusts the surrounding body to better accommodate greater pregnancy.
context: <<POS:05953247>> e.tooltip='This implant causes a synthetic lining to grow in and around'
